title: Amauropelta rivulorum

As a fern, Amauropelta rivulorum has been used in traditional medicine due to its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. taxonomy: Amauropelta rivulorum is a species of fern in the family Thelychridaceae. It belongs to the genus Amauropelta, which is a group of ferns native to South America. The classification of Amauropelta rivulorum is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Pteridophyta, class Polypodiopsida, and order Polypodiales.
